Off Calendar Sep-07-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Nov-16-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David S. Secrest, Esq., 650/726-7461, for plaintiff Lisa Thornquist, M.D.
Larry E. Wollert, II, Esq. of GORDON & REES 986-5900, for defendant The Regents of University of California
Michael G. Woods, Esq. of MCCORMICK, BARSTOW 559/433-1300, for defendant Fresno Community Hospital and Medical Center

Proceeding:
Case assigned to David P. Dawson, Judge pro temp, for settlement conference. Case settled and taken off the trial calendar. Counsel put terms of settlement on the record:
1. $175,000 paid to Dr. Thornquist by the Regents.
2. No reemployment of Dr. Thornquist.
3. 1542 waiver.
4. Each side to bear its own costs.
5. Counsel to prepare an agreement, and settlement should be executed in 6 weeks.
